homeTitle: Detroit Tours | Self-Guided Black History, Music & Walking Routes
homeDescription: Explore Black Detroit through self-guided routes built around Motown, Black Bottom, labor history, political power, and neighborhood memory.
catalogTitle: Detroit Walking Tours | Black History, Music & Neighborhood Routes
catalogDescription: Browse self-guided Detroit routes built for Motown memory, Black Detroit history, labor landmarks, and neighborhood depth.
homePanelTitle: See Detroit through music, labor, and neighborhood memory.
homePanelBody: Start with Motown and Black Bottom, then move through labor landmarks, Black political power, and west-side neighborhood routes shaped for story, map guidance, narration, and AR-ready context.
homePanelHighlights: Neighborhood memory on the west side
